stories.title: Initialize Express project with TypeScript and Prisma
acceptance_criteria: package.json with express, typescript, prisma, vitest devDependencies
tsconfig.json with strict mode enabled
prisma/schema.prisma defines Note model: id Int @id, title String, body String, createdAt DateTime, updatedAt DateTime
npm run build succeeds with zero errors

stories.title: Note CRUD service layer
acceptance_criteria: createNote({title, body}) returns note with generated id and timestamps
getNote(id) returns the note or throws NotFoundError
listNotes() returns all notes ordered by updatedAt descending
updateNote(id, {title, body}) modifies the note and updates updatedAt
deleteNote(id) removes the note; subsequent getNote throws NotFoundError

stories.title: REST endpoints with validation
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/notes returns 200 with JSON array
POST /api/notes with {title, body} returns 201 with created note
GET /api/notes/:id returns 200 or 404
PUT /api/notes/:id with {title, body} returns 200 or 404
DELETE /api/notes/:id returns 204 or 404
POST /api/notes with missing title returns 400 with validation error

stories.title: Full-text search and pagination
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/notes?q=keyword searches title and body (case-insensitive)
GET /api/notes?page=2&limit=10 returns paginated results
Response includes x-total-count header
Default limit is 20, max is 100
Empty result returns 200 with empty array
